title: Some fixes for the recent updates and other changes

texts: Fixed dropdowns getting cut off in build panels.
Added a space at the start of draggable sections to prevent the first items from being cut off.
Fixed newer builds displaying the icons container at the side even without icons.
Added a slight style change to identity and E.G.O icons on the homepage and release history.
Adjusted the positioning of overlaid deployment numbers in builds.
Reorganized how homepage links are displayed.
Added vote count to community poll.
Fixed an issue in Company where separate by sinner broke the page.
Fixed an issue in Company where egos were being sorted before identities when using the "Both" tab.
